items.claim: Tommy has had a good training camp and has been performing well in sparring.
items.quote: He's had a good camp. He's been looking [__] good in sparring.

items.claim: Tommy is difficult to defeat because of his movement.
items.quote: Anybody that fights him is just going to have they're going to have to just literally How do you beat him? You have to just kill him, bro. Just make him not move, bro. Like, otherwise, if he can still move, you're [__]

items.claim: Alberto Montes has high-level striking and front headlock skills.
items.quote: He's got good striking. He's got good front headlocks.

items.claim: Alberto Montes has a record of 12-1 with 11 wins coming by way of submission.
items.quote: He's 12 and one and I think 11 of his wins were submissions.

items.claim: Alberto Montes has only recorded one knockout in his professional career.
items.quote: Bro, he only has one knockout, though. One knockout in his whole career.
you can't sub Tommy. Really? I mean, if we we saw that was that was very difficult.

items.claim: Alberto Montes is currently on a streak of four consecutive submission victories.
items.quote: He's coming off of four subs in a row.
